title: The Leonardo Collection Highland Cow Coasters – Set of 4 For Home & Office | Stylish Drink Mat For Kitchen & Dining | Durable Drink Coasters For Tabletops | Decorative Home Accessories for Drinks
features: VERSATILE DRINK MAT FOR DAILY USE: This Leonardo Collection coaster is perfect for cups, mugs, and glasses—protects all tabletop surfaces while adding a stylish touch to your kitchen or home décor.

IDEAL FOR KITCHEN & DINING SPACES: Suitable for modern and classic homes, this drink mat works well with wooden, ceramic, cork, marble, or slate coasters, complementing all types of dining arrangements.
DESIGNED FOR STYLE & PROTECTION: Crafted with care, this table coaster resists heat, condensation, and scratches—ideal for protecting wooden, glass, or stone dining and coffee tables.
MATCHES MODERN HOME ACCESSORIES: Coordinates with various decorative home accessories including cork, black, ceramic, glass, and wooden coasters—designed for elegant table presentation.
THOUGHTFUL GIFT FOR ANY SPACE: Whether for your own kitchen or as a gift for birthdays or housewarmings, this coaster is a practical and stylish choice for any drinkware and tabletop arrangement.
